manifest.name: M02_P0200 Master Data
manifest.summary: Master Data: Users, Employees, Hierarchy, Department Blocks, Restaurant Config
manifest.author: PSM
manifest.description:
M02_P0200: HR Master Data
============================
Creates standard users and employees with strict 1-to-1 linking and hierarchy.
Also adds 'x_is_portal_manager' field to Users to identify Portal Managers (DM, SM).

Features:
- Department Blocks (RST/OPS)
- POS integration for OPS departments
- Restaurant Area / Positioning Area / Station configuration
- Shift (Ca làm) configuration

Hierarchy:
RGM (Internal) -> DM (Portal) -> SM (Portal) -> Crew (Portal)

models.description: Vị Trí Công Việc Mặc Định
Vị Trí Chi Tiết Nhà Hàng

feature_summary: Portal and website controllers for recruitment pages and application flow.
Dedicated recruitment groups, access rules, and security bridges.
Seed data for sequences, stages, approval categories, mail templates, cron jobs, and surveys.
